Q1 2026 Sales Report
Total revenue: $1.2M

Key insight: APAC region grew 34% YoY.

============================================================
BENCHMARK COMPARISON — SaaS Industry Q1 2026
============================================================

Metric                          Our Performance    Industry Benchmark    Status
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Revenue Growth (YoY)            34% (APAC)         28% median            ABOVE MEDIAN
                                                   45%+ top quartile     BELOW TOP QUARTILE

Customer Acquisition Cost       N/A (not tracked)  -12% vs 2025         NEEDS DATA

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
ANALYSIS:
- Our APAC region's 34% YoY growth exceeds the SaaS industry median of 28%,
  placing us solidly in the second quartile.
- We are below the top-quartile threshold of 45%+, indicating room for
  acceleration to reach best-in-class performance.
- CAC trends are favorable industry-wide (-12% vs 2025), but we lack
  internal tracking to compare. Recommend adding CAC metrics to future reports.
